text: STAGE An orange writhing mass of bubbling flesh, encompassing the mall. �First time it is witnessed (1 Stress). �Touching the barrier triggers a Whisper Card (p. 37). ▶A shadow moves on the other side. ▶Its sickly light is always visible from the glass doors and skylight. ▶Damaging it only reveals more of the barrier before it heals itself, consuming anything within reach. ▶Two people are slowly being consumed by the barrier. �Extreme levels of pain creates opportunity to break through. �See Dying in the Mall(p. 8). 2. BARRIER MAIN ENTRANCE DMV POLLY’S PET EMPORIUM SKATE WORLD MAINTENANCE LOADING DOCKS YOUR BODY IS A TEMPLE WELLNESS CLINIC MOOTSY’S ARCADE STAGE PARKING GARAGE 1 PARKING GARAGE 2 PARKING GARAGE 3 LEVEL 1 [12] Level 1 // This is where it all begins. The barrier, the first Child, your PCs’ first WHISPER CARD. FREIGHT ELEVATOR Fruiting Bodies are the answer to where the missing people have gone. Embrace the horror. [13] The mall’s massive circulatory system. ▶Grilles (36” x 40”, half the size of a door) litter the mall. They are hinged, with most security screws missing. ▶Most vents are comfortably crawlable, with "ladders" granting access to upper levels. ▶Some vents are narrow, impeding easy movement, others have sudden drops which run risk of falling (d4 damage). FRUITING BODIES bloomfrom missing townspeople in the vents. ▶Encountering a Fruiting Body triggers a Whisper Card (p. 37). ▶A faint haze of fungal spores fills the air around the bodies. ▶The emaciated bodies are spatchcocked but still “alive.” �Fleshy-fungal growths explode out of chest and throat. �Strands of viscera and fungus web out, keeping them affixed to the vent. �Each “breath”releases a cloud of bright yellow spores that get sucked down into the vent. ▶Odd symbols, smeared with blood, are carved into the metal around each body. �They match those in the manager's notebook (p. 19) and Billy’s “room” (p. 14) - (Clue). ▶Patches of mud trail away from the bodies - (Clue). Deeper into the vents smell distinctly of earth and minerals. ▶They lead deeper and deeper, eventually to the Ventilation Access (p. 24) in the mines. �Entering this lower level triggers a Whisper Card (p. 37). 4. THE VENTS (ALL LEVELS) Three massive multi-story garages, built to confuse. ▶20 cars remain within. ▶Near an exit, a car crashed into the Barrier (p. 12) and has now been mostly consumed. ▶A sprinter van, its engine running, is backed up against a Vent. �Inside is a Fruiting Body and a makeshift air distribution system - Whisper Card (p. 37). 3. PARKING GARAGES d10Search Car Table 01Cassettes 02Pistol 03Duct Tape 04First Aid Kit 05Tactical Flashlight 06Can of Gas 07Bolt Cutters 08 Chainsaw, Can of Gas, Extendable Tree Pruning Pole 09Bags of Groceries 10Ornate Amulet Each car has a car battery, jumper cables, and tire iron (d6). Medium-sized workshop area. Buzzing fluorescent lights swing gently in sputtering air from the vent. ▶Crammed full of mall storage, leaving only a small corner for the workshop. ▶Tools and raw materials meticulously organized (50% chance to find any tool). �One chainsaw (bulky) with 2 cans of gasoline. �A welding torch, safety equipment (+1 armor), 2x fuel. ▶A combination lockbox hanging by the door contains a copy of each store key. ▶A well stocked first aid kit hangs on the wall. ▶A board fills half the wall with safety signage, and a to-do list - (Clue). �Clear lower store room. �Find the cause of all the mud. �Add screws to vent grilles. �Find source of smell. 5. MAINTENANCE Where trucks are off-loaded and their goods distributed throughout the mall. ▶Includes a staging area, storage, Billy’s office, freight elevator and access hallways. 6A. Billy’s Office located off of the loading dock. ▶Nudie posters cover the walls. ▶Scrawled on top of the posters, covering every inch of the space, are geometric symbols - (Clue). �Upon entry (1 Stress). ▶Investigating symbols trigger a Whisper Card (p. 37). ▶A small cot and TV fill most of the space. Under the cot is: �Billy's ID tag. �Sawed-off Shotgun (d6 blast, bulky). �Heavy-duty key on a leather necklace, specked with mud- (Clue). �Tackle box with 6 shotgun shells. 6B. Freight Elevator located off of the loading dock. ▶Connects the Access Hallways (p. 11) to each floor, including the Basement (p. 21). ▶Florescent light flickers incessantly. ▶Specks of blood, mud, and mold stain the floor of the elevator. ▶Some bloody fingernails are embedded in the tattered padding along the walls. 6. LOADING DOCKS The outer facade is filled with screens playing instructional jazzercise intercut with motivational mantras and smooth jazz. ▶Large open room, shelves lined with supplements, vitamins, shoes and pastel purple tracksuits. ▶Large stage with three screens hanging behind it. ▶Door near the stage leads to a back. ▶The back rooms have quiet smooth jazz music dubbed with upbeat “guided meditation.” The space is divided into: �A bunk room for the members. �A rec room playing recorded “workouts” on loop. �Two single bathrooms, retrofitted with shower heads. �A small room that acts as Griffith’s sleeping quarters and office. �A closet that has been converted into a video recording studio. 6. YOUR BODY IS A TEMPLE: MOVEMENT AND WELLNESS CLINIC [14] Level 1 // Maintenance and the Loading Dock have a lot of clues and resources for players. Open floor plan, free-range petting zoo style petshop (but dangerous animals are locked up). It is a mix of standard and extremely esoteric animals. ▶The shop is dark. Its flimsy lock will permanently break if forced open. ▶Audible sound of animals crying to get out. ▶Aisles filled to the brim with aquarium and pet cages, many of which are open. ▶The floor is covered in highly flammable pee-soaked sawdust. ▶Audible sound of animals crying to get out. �In the dark, a roiling chimera of fused-together animals. �It will attack any who venture within. �STR: 15 DEX 7 HP: 6 Bite (D6, blast) 8. POLLY’S PET EMPORIUM Level 1 // Polly’s Pets is some good 80s animal based body horror. Seed something
